prompt: What are the most common reasons for loan denial in 2024? Break it down by the top 10 lenders to see if denial reasons differ across institutions.

assertions.name: sql_file_created
assertions.description: A query.sql file is created with valid SQL syntax

assertions.name: denial_reason_aggregation
assertions.description: SQL aggregates denial_reason_1, denial_reason_2, denial_reason_3 columns

assertions.name: lender_breakdown
assertions.description: Results break down denial reasons by top 10 lenders

assertions.name: identifies_common_reasons
assertions.description: Query identifies the most frequent denial reason codes

assertions.name: summary_report_exists
assertions.description: A summary.txt report is generated with key findings

assertions.name: report_compares_lenders
assertions.description: Report identifies whether denial reasons vary significantly across lenders
